source_posture: source-owned language companion for prepared atlas projection labels; source witnesses and authored works remain stronger than this display ledger
original_language_rule: For works, text corpora, inscriptions, and source witnesses, future planting must preserve attested original title or mark the original slot pending; never invent original-language text from translation.
downstream_consumer_rule: abyss-stack and other graph tools may select display language from generated multilingual fields, but Tree-of-Sophia remains source authority.

fallback_policy.ru: Use the source label when the prepared source row is Russian.
fallback_policy.en: Use reviewed exact labels first; otherwise emit a marked draft label from conservative phrase replacements so downstream tools can operate without treating the draft as canon.
fallback_policy.original: Preserve attested original or transliteration only when the source surface carries it; otherwise leave original null and mark original status pending or not_applicable.
